text:
To compute the sum of digits of 999, we first need to identify the individual digits. 
The number 999 has three digits: 9, 9, and 9.
Since each digit is 9, we can calculate the sum by adding these digits together: 9 + 9 + 9.
Performing the addition: 9 + 9 = 18, then 18 + 9 = 27.
So, the sum of the digits is 27.

27
